login.password.feedback.addWords: Add another word or two. Uncommon words are better.
login.password.feedback.allUpper: All-uppercase is almost as easy to guess as all-lowercase.
login.password.feedback.avoidDates: Avoid dates and years associated with you.
login.password.feedback.capitalization: Capitalization does not help very much.
login.password.feedback.common10: This is a top-10 common password.
login.password.feedback.common100: This is a top-100 common password.
login.password.feedback.commonPassword: This is a very common password.
login.password.feedback.dates: Dates are often easy to guess.
login.password.feedback.keyboard: Straight rows of keys are easy to guess.
login.password.feedback.name: Names and surnames by themselves are easy to guess.
login.password.feedback.names: Common names and surnames are easy to guess.
login.password.feedback.noNeedSymbols: Symbols, digits, or uppercase letters are not always needed.
login.password.feedback.recentYears: Recent years are easy to guess.
login.password.feedback.repeatPattern: Repeated patterns are only slightly harder to guess.
login.password.feedback.repeats: Repeats like "aaa" are easy to guess.
login.password.feedback.reversed: Reversed words are not much harder to guess.
login.password.feedback.sequence: Sequences like abc or 6543 are easy to guess.
login.password.feedback.shortKeyboard: Short keyboard patterns are easy to guess.
login.password.feedback.similar: This is similar to a commonly used password.
login.password.feedback.substitution: Predictable substitutions like @ for a do not help much.
login.password.feedback.useWords: Use a few words and avoid common phrases.
login.password.feedback.word: A single word is easy to guess.
login.password.label: Password strength:
login.password.lengthMin: Password must be at least {{count}} characters
login.password.tooWeak: Password is too weak. Choose a stronger password.
